beats: Visitors walking along designated path, not touching equipment

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 不得随意触摸设备、物料、工装、产品和记录表单。未经允许，不得操作设备，不得进入黄线以内或设备防护区域。

prompt.positive: Visitors in clean suits walking along marked path in clean workshop, machinery in background, yellow floor lines, sterile environment
prompt.negative: touching equipment, removing mask, crossing yellow line
